'''âg-b-s-k''' ('''kagabsekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wolfwhistle|wolfwhistle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-s-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wolfwhistle|wolfwhistle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âg-b-s-k
|-
! Lemma
| kagabsekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigabsekoko|thigabsekoko]] || [[word:jigabsekoko|jigabsekoko]] || [[word:shigabsekoko|shigabsekoko]] || [[word:kigabsekoko|kigabsekoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugabsekoko|thuthugabsekoko]] || [[word:jujugabsekoko|jujugabsekoko]] || [[word:shushugabsekoko|shushugabsekoko]] || [[word:kukugabsekoko|kukugabsekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠgabsekoko|thĂŠgabsekoko]] || [[word:jĂŠgabsekoko|jĂŠgabsekoko]] || [[word:shĂŠgabsekoko|shĂŠgabsekoko]] || [[word:kĂŠgabsekoko|kĂŠgabsekoko]]
|-

|-

|-
